emails.subject: Tenn Transport
emails.body: Tenn Transport We are buying the following Tenn transport from the pipeline for the winter. I just did the deals so I don't have the contract numbers. Term Demand Comm MDQ Nov .18 .02 3893 Nov-Jan .20 .02 2500 Feb-Mar .20 .02 2500 The Primary delivery point is CGAS Broad Run. The primary receipt point is meter #010698 in 500L. We will be able to use any zone 1 receipt point but we only be able to use Broad Run as our delivery point.

emails.subject: RE: Tenn Transport
emails.body: RE: Tenn Transport Is the .02 commodity inclusive of ACA?
